productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Tan Casual Shoes
description: Straight from the Earthkeeper's range comes a comfortable boot for women called the timberland Vintera Chukka. So all you women out there, get ready to get stylish and enjoy the winter in style in these comfy boots.UpperLeather and canvas upper for absolute durability and comfortMock leather lacing around the ankle Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitFabric inner lining for all-day comfortPadded footbed with a leather lining for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for all-day lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable grippy rubber outsole textured throughout, with a pivot point on the big toe mound, terraced grooves on the forefoot and smoot on the toe region for absolute grip and tractionBoot careWipe dust with a damp, clean clothDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
